problem: Gastroenterology practices need an all-in-one platform that handles scheduling, clinical documentation, endoscopy reporting, and revenue cycle management specifically designed for GI workflows rather than adapted from general practice software.
solution: gGastro by gHealth Systems provides an integrated gastroenterology platform including EHR, practice management, endoscopy reporting, and patient engagement tools. The cloud-based system is designed specifically for GI practices with specialty-specific templates, quality reporting, and billing optimization.
